channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyatta Trust Supports Underprivileged Students with Education and Mentorship Programmes
item.description: The Kenyatta Trust, set up in 2010 by the Kenyatta family with former president Uhuru Kenyatta as patron, has been making a significant impact on education and youth empowerment in Kenya. The non-prof...

item.title: Trump Suspends US Naval Escort Plan as Iran-US Peace Talks Progress
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a temporary suspension of 'Project Freedom,' his plan to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, following objections from key regional allies. Saudi Arabia ...

item.title: BJP's Election Strategy in Bengal Focused on Bangladesh-Related Issues
item.description: The 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections marked a historic shift, with the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) displacing the Trinamool Congress (TMC) after 15 years in power. While anti-incumbency sentiment,...

item.title: GlobalFest moves to Spruce Meadows for 2026, impacting northeast Calgary community
item.description: For over twenty years, GlobalFest has been a cherished late-summer tradition in northeast Calgary, attracting thousands with its cultural displays and entertainment. Organizers have now announced that...

item.title: Rivers stakeholders show early support for Fubara’s 2027 re-election with APC forms purchase
item.description: For Rivers State, one group of elders and political stakeholders don step forward to show strong support for Governor Siminalayi Fubara ahead of the 2027 governorship election. Dem go as far as buying...

item.title: Government discussions with Trump on Australian biometric data raise privacy concerns
item.description: Recent reporting by Crikey has revealed that the Australian Department of Home Affairs is in discussions with the Trump administration to provide access to biometric data held on Australians and those...

item.title: U.S. Offers Plan to Gradually Reopen Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions with Iran
item.description: The United States has presented Iran with a memorandum of understanding aimed at gradually reopening the strategically important Strait of Hormuz and lifting the American blockade on Iranian ports. Th...

item.title: Severe Weather Causes Flooding, Road Closures, and Property Damage Across South Africa
item.description: South Africa is facing widespread disruption as a powerful cut-off low-pressure system brings heavy rainfall, thunderstorms, and flooding across multiple regions. The South African Weather Service has...

item.title: ASEAN Summit Faces Regional and Global Security Challenges

item.title: PBC moves to curb unethical ‘no win, no fee’ practices among lawyers

item.title: SA leaders emphasise complexity behind protests, reject blanket xenophobia label
item.description: During a media briefing in Cape Town, Presidency spokesperson Vincent Magwenya addressed concerns about South Africa being labelled as xenophobic, insisting that such a characterisation is a simplisti...

item.title: Gachagua Criticises Government Policies Amid Workers' Welfare Forum, Continues Speech Despite Power Outage

item.title: Public invited to submit questions ahead of Australia’s 2026 federal budget

item.title: Alberta Government Confirms No Foreign Interference in Separatist Movement Amid Data Breach Concerns

item.title: Rising Stars: Promising New Filipina Actresses in 2026
item.description: The entertainment scene in the Philippines is welcoming a fresh wave of talented and captivating Filipina actresses who are making their mark in 2026. These emerging stars combine charisma, skill, and...

item.title: Veteran Chris Hani Councillor Thumeka Bikwana Found Murdered at Her Home
item.description: Thumeka Bikwana, a respected 63-year-old councillor and member of the mayoral committee in the Chris Hani District Municipality, was tragically shot dead at her home in Tshatshu village, Cacadu, on Tu...

item.title: Asagba of Asaba and Olu of Warri Strengthen Historic Ties and Regional Collaboration
item.description: The Asagba of Asaba, Prof. Epiphany Azinge, don call for stronger commitment to deepen the long-standing relationship between Asaba and Warri kingdoms, as he host the Olu of Warri, Ogiame Atuwatse III...

item.title: Rappler Confirms President Marcos is in Good Health, Debunks Drug Use Claims
item.description: A viral video claiming that President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. was hospitalized in critical condition due to illegal drug use has been debunked by Rappler. The video, uploaded on May 5, gained significant...
